intent: Survey GEMM/autotune toolchain after post-R3.1 prefill profile showed Cijk/Tensile GEMM dominance.

verdict.next_step: Create and execute an env-gated PyTorch/vLLM-level GEMM autotune A/B task; do not rely on standalone rocBLAS/hipBLASLt bench tools in this container.
verdict.required_precondition: Attribute hot Cijk rows to model ops/shapes before choosing knobs.
verdict.scope: configuration/library-selection only; no GEMM kernel writing.
